nasb.text: And He was casting out a demon, and it was mute; when the demon had gone out, the mute man spoke; and the crowds were amazed.

esv.text: Now he was casting out a demon that was mute. When the demon had gone out, the mute man spoke, and the people marveled.

cnv.text: 耶穌趕出一個啞巴鬼，鬼既出去，啞巴就說起話來，眾人都希奇。

ccb.text: 有一次，耶稣赶出一个使人哑巴的鬼。鬼一出去，哑巴就能说话了，大家都很惊奇。

csbs.text: 有一次，耶稣正在驱赶一个使人成为哑巴的鬼魔。鬼魔一出去，哑巴就说出话来，众人都感到惊奇。
